welcome.title: Become a Sonari member.
welcome.lead: Three clear steps: choose your residence area, issue one soulbound Membership SBT, and verify your identity whenever you are ready.
welcome.walletHint: Connect your Sui wallet to get started.

membership.registeredTitle: You already have a Membership SBT.
membership.registeredBody: This wallet ({ownerShort}) already holds a Membership SBT. Go to your dashboard, or use Get started below to update your registration.
membership.errorNote: Could not check your Membership SBT. You can still continue with Get started.

residence.title: Choose your residence area.
residence.lead: Search a place or tap the map. Sonari stores only the selected H3 cell — never your raw address or GPS history.

statements.0: This cell is my active residence area for Sonari eligibility checks.
statements.1: I understand changes after a disaster cutoff do not apply to that disaster.
statements.2: Sonari stores the selected H3 cell, not my raw address or GPS history.

residence.nextHint: Select your residence cell and affirm every statement to continue.

saveError.cellNotSelected: No residence cell is selected. Please select a cell on the map.
saveError.invalidCell: The selected cell is not a valid H3 resolution 7 cell. Please select again.

picker.searchHint: Search text may be sent to a map provider. Sonari stores the selected H3 cell only.
picker.unconfiguredBody: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY to enable the map. You can still enter an H3 cell manually from Advanced cell input below.
picker.mapError: The map failed to load. Try again later, or use Advanced cell input below.
picker.workerUnavailable: Land/sea check is unavailable, so all cells are selectable for now.
picker.waterMessage: Cells over water cannot be selected as a residence.
picker.geolocationUnavailable: Current location is not available on this device.
picker.geolocationDenied: Permission to read your current location was denied.
picker.invalidCellInput: The H3 cell ID is not valid (expected a resolution 7 hex cell ID).
picker.advancedHelp: Debug only. Enter a hex H3 cell to override the selection. The saved value is the decimal cell ID.

membership.title: Issue your Membership SBT.
membership.lead: Choose your residence first, then issue one soulbound membership per wallet. It cannot be transferred, and holding it does not guarantee aid or payout priority.

statements.0: This wallet will own one active Sonari Membership SBT.
statements.1: The Membership SBT is soulbound and cannot be transferred.
statements.2: Holding a Membership SBT does not guarantee aid or create payout priority.

issue.connectWallet: Connect a wallet to issue your Membership SBT.
issue.residenceRequired: Select your residence area before issuing.
issue.ready: Ready to issue the Membership SBT for this residence.
issue.checking: Checking whether this wallet already has a Membership SBT…
issue.alreadyIssued: This wallet already has a Membership SBT. Continue to the next step.
issue.submitting: Approve the transaction in your wallet.
issue.lookupFailed: Could not look up your Membership SBT.
issue.multiple: Multiple Membership SBTs were found for this wallet. Contact support before continuing.
issue.proofWorkerMissing: Residence proof worker is not configured.
issue.proofFetchFailed: Could not fetch the residence proof.
issue.invalidProofResponse: The residence proof response is invalid.
issue.residenceNotAllowed: The selected residence cell is not in the allowlist.

membership.nextHint: Affirm every statement above to continue.

identity.title: Verify it's you. Now or later.
identity.lead: Initial registration only needs the residence cell and Membership SBT. Identity verification becomes required only before payout, and you can finish it from the member area anytime.

kyc.label: KYC
kyc.description: Use a provider-verified duplicate key. Raw KYC data and document images are not published by Sonari.

world_id.label: World ID
world_id.description: Use a World ID nullifier for the Sonari claim action. You can set this up now or from the member area later.

membership.connectBody: Sonari reads your Membership SBT and wallet address automatically — no manual entry.
membership.checkingBody: Looking up the pass owned by your connected wallet.
membership.detectedBody: Verification binds to this pass and your connected wallet.
membership.none: No Membership SBT found for this wallet. Issue it in the previous step first.
membership.multiple: Multiple Membership SBTs found for this wallet. Please contact support before verifying.
membership.errorFallback: Could not look up your Membership SBT.

statements.0: I do not hold another active Sonari Membership SBT.
statements.1: I will not claim the same disaster from multiple Membership SBTs.
statements.2: I understand I can skip identity setup now and return before receiving Relief Cash.

worldId.statementsFirst: Affirm the duplicate-account statement above to enable verification.
worldId.acceptStatementsError: Accept the duplicate-account statement above first.
worldId.bindingError: Fill in owner, membership, and statement first.
worldId.prepareError: Failed to prepare World ID verification.

submit.notConfigured: Identity submit endpoint is not configured.
submit.processingNotice: Processing can take a few minutes to about one hour. You can check the status on mypage.

done.title: Your registration is ready.
done.lead: Here is what Sonari has recorded for this wallet. You can change identity settings anytime from the member area.
done.finalizeComingSoon: Identity verification can still be completed later from the member area.

mypage.title: My Page
mypage.subtitle: Review the contents of your MembershipPass.

states.disconnectedBody: Connect a wallet to read your membership details.
states.notRegisteredBody: Complete registration to see your membership here.
states.errorBody: We could not read your membership. Please try again later.
states.errorMultiple: Multiple memberships were found for this wallet. Please contact support.
states.unconfiguredBody: The membership source is not configured, so details cannot be shown.

hero.title: Send support with a clear trail.
hero.sub: A front-end donation flow for USDC support, pool selection, public display preferences, and receipt previews.
hero.walletBody: Connect a wallet to prepare a donation transaction.

general.label: General Donation
general.description: Supports the main relief pool for future verified aid.

earthquake.label: Earthquake Relief
earthquake.description: Directs most funds to the selected disaster relief pool.

publicName.title: Public display name
publicName.description: Show a name on receipts and leaderboard previews.

anonymous.title: Anonymous mode
anonymous.description: Use Anonymous Donor in public lists.

corporate.title: Corporate sponsor mode
corporate.description: Prepare sponsor logo and profile fields later.

donorPass.label: DonorPass
donorPass.value: Issued or updated for this wallet

receipt.label: Receipt
receipt.value: Public impact receipt, recipient data anonymized

leaderboard.label: Leaderboard
leaderboard.value: Rank updates without claim rights or payout priority

note.title: DonorPass note
note.body: DonorPass records contribution history only. It does not provide claim rights, payout priority, or promised aid.

hero.sub: Sonari verifies who should receive aid after a disaster using public source data, privacy-preserving residence proofs, and transparent receipts.

how.title: Four steps from donation to relief.
how.sub: No hidden discretion. No payout promises. Just verifiable steps anyone can audit.

step1.title: Donate in USDC
step1.body: Choose a pool. Donations are recorded on-chain with a DonorPass contribution history.

step2.title: Disaster verified
step2.body: USGS reports are re-fetched and signed only after the source data matches.

step3.title: Eligibility checked
step3.body: Recipients need an active pass and a residence proof inside the affected H3 cells.

step4.title: Relief, with a receipt
step4.body: Each payout creates an anonymized Impact Receipt without exposing personal details.

main.name: Main Pool
main.description: General relief reserves across active programs.

supporters.title: People and partners keeping the reserve full.

why.title: Donation infrastructure, not a payout promise.

witnessable.title: Witnessable end to end
witnessable.body: Donation, eligibility, and payout activity is visible through public receipts.

private.title: Recipient-private by design
private.body: Raw addresses, phone numbers, and personal identifiers stay off-chain.

checked.title: Checked before aid moves
checked.body: A finalized event, active pass, and valid residence proof are required.

trust.title: Sonari is aid infrastructure for transparent donations.
trust.copy: DonorPass records contribution history only. Receiving relief depends on verified eligibility for a finalized disaster event.
trust.item1: Donating does not create claim rights.
trust.item2: Top donors get recognition, not payout priority.
trust.item3: Relief is paid to the verified Membership SBT owner.
trust.item4: KYC and World ID follow the same full-support route.
trust.item5: Pause, oracle, and sponsor controls are visible.
trust.item6: Sponsor logos require verification and approval.

footer.brandDesc: Transparent donation infrastructure for verified aid.

hero.title: Transparent activity, at a glance.
hero.sub: A public view of pool balances, finalized events, recent donations, verified claims, and anonymized impact receipts.

hero.title: Check eligibility without exposing private details.
hero.sub: A front-end claim flow for MembershipPass status, finalized disaster events, eligibility checks, and Relief Cash transaction previews.
hero.walletBody: Connect a wallet to load MembershipPass and claim history.

finalized.label: DisasterEvent finalized
finalized.detail: Signed payload has been accepted by the program.

membership.label: MembershipPass active
membership.detail: Connected wallet has a current MembershipPass.

residence.label: Residence cell included
residence.detail: Registered H3 cell appears in affected_cells.

noPreviousClaim.label: No previous claim
noPreviousClaim.detail: This event has not been claimed by this pass.

poolBudget.label: Pool budget available
poolBudget.detail: Relief pool has enough available amount for the estimate.

errors.workerMissing: Affected proof worker is not configured.
errors.outsideArea: Residence cell is outside this event.
errors.fetchFailed: Affected proof could not be fetched.
errors.verifyFailed: Affected proof could not be verified.

note.title: Privacy boundary
note.body: Public screens should show H3 cell, pass status, verification status, and anonymized recipient references only.

idle.detail: The transaction digest, receipt link, and status can render here after signing.

building.detail: Preparing the claim transaction for signing.

submitting.message: Approve the transaction in your wallet.
submitting.detail: Approve the claim transaction in your connected wallet.

failed.detail: The claim transaction was not completed.
